violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Clean the handle of the slicer and below the mixers.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Repair the three drawers on the banquet prep table so they open and close.
Service/janitor's sink. — --Repair the leaks at the following sites - three compartment sink, two hand sinks, prep sink.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
